evals.name: rename-file-from-curl
evals.prompt:
帮我实现这个请求的功能：

```bash
curl 'http://127.0.0.1:13579/v2/file/modify' -X POST \
  -H 'Referer: http://127.0.0.1:13579/home/fileManage/myFiles?path=%2Fsata14%2Fmy%2Fdata%2F%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%B9' \
  --data-raw 'path=%2Fsata14%2Fmy%2Fdata%2F%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%B9%2Ftest-rename-dir&newname=test-rename-dir-2'
```
evals.expected_output: 实现重命名功能，支持 CLI rename 命令和 MCP rename 工具

assertions.name: api-function-exists
assertions.description: API 函数 rename_item 存在于 api/file.py

assertions.name: cli-command-registered
assertions.description: CLI 命令 rename 已注册到 commands/__init__.py

assertions.name: mcp-tool-registered
assertions.description: MCP 工具 rename 已注册到 mcp/tools/__init__.py

assertions.name: test-only-allowed-dir
assertions.description: 测试只使用了 /sata14/my/data/测试文件夹

assertions.name: cli-test-passes
assertions.description: CLI rename 命令执行通过
